title: rubus conothyrsoides
intro: Rubus conothyrsoides, also known as the Chinese raspberry or Five-angled bramble, is a type of thorny shrub native to China. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Rubus conothyrsoides include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and supporting immune function. Rubus conothyrsoides can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
